final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Metadata:
  Description: Production-ready VPC with public/private subnets, NAT, ALB, SGs, ECR, and SSM parameters
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-vpc"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-1"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [2, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-2"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
  EIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
  NATGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP.AllocationId
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-rt"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-rt"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
  PrivateRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway
  ALBSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: ALB Security Group
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-alb-sg"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
  AppSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Application Security Group
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref ALBSG
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref ALBSG
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-app-sg"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
  DBSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Database Security Group
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 5432
          ToPort: 5432
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref AppSG
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-db-sg"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
  ALB:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Scheme: internal
      Subnets:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref ALBSG
      Type: application
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-alb"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
  ALBListener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref ALB
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: fixed-response
          FixedResponseConfig:
            StatusCode: '503'
            ContentType: 'text/plain'
            MessageBody: 'Service Unavailable'
  ECRRepository:
    Type: AWS::ECR::Repository
    Properties:
      RepositoryName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-app-repo"
      ImageScanningConfiguration:
        ScanOnPush: true
      ImageTagMutability: MUTABLE
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
  VpcIdSSM:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /prod/network/vpc-id
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref VPC
      Description: VPC ID for production network
  PublicSubnetSSM:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /prod/network/public-subnet
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PublicSubnet
      Description: Public subnet ID
  PrivateSubnet1SSM:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /prod/network/private-subnet-1
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      Description: Private subnet 1 ID
  PrivateSubnet2SSM:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /prod/network/private-subnet-2
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      Description: Private subnet 2 ID
  ALBSGSSM:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /prod/network/alb-sg
      Type: String
      Value: !GetAtt ALBSG.GroupId
      Description: ALB Security Group ID
  AppSGSSM:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /prod/network/app-sg
      Type: String
      Value: !GetAtt AppSG.GroupId
      Description: Application Security Group ID
  DBSGSSM:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /prod/network/db-sg
      Type: String
      Value: !GetAtt DBSG.GroupId
      Description: Database Security Group ID
  ALBListenerSSM:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /prod/network/alb-listener
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref ALBListener
      Description: ALB HTTP Listener ARN

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Serverless pipeline to collect, store, and analyze AWS Organization data for centralized governance and reporting.

Parameters:
  ManagementAccountId:
    Type: String
    Default: '123456789012'
    Description: AWS Account ID of the Organization Management account for cross-account role assumption
  AthenaDatabaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: managementcur
    Description: Name of the Athena/Glue database to catalog the organizational data
  S3BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'org-governance-data'
    Description: Prefix for the unique S3 bucket name (e.g., my-org-data)
  TagsToInclude:
    Type: String
    Default: 'Environment,CostCenter'
    Description: Comma-separated list of tag keys to include in the generated reports (e.g., Environment,CostCenter)

Resources:
  OrgDataBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${S3BucketName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: ExpireNoncurrentVersions
            Status: Enabled
            NoncurrentVersionExpirationInDays: 90
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: OrgGovernancePipeline
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  OrgDataBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref OrgDataBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnsecuredTransports
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Ref OrgDataBucket
              - !Sub '${OrgDataBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: DenyUnencryptedObjects
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:PutObject'
            Resource: !Sub '${OrgDataBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption': AES256

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Path: /service-role/
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: OrgGovernancePipeline

  LambdaOrganizationsPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaOrganizationsPolicy'
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - organizations:DescribeOrganization
              - organizations:ListAccounts
              - organizations:ListRoots
              - organizations:ListOrganizationalUnitsForParent
              - organizations:ListTagsForResource
            Resource: '*'

  LambdaSTSAssumePolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaSTSAssumePolicy'
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${ManagementAccountId}:role/OrganizationsReaderRole'

  LambdaS3Policy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaS3Policy'
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt OrgDataBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}/*'

  OrganizationsDataCollector:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import os
          from datetime import datetime
          from botocore.exceptions import ClientError

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              s3_bucket = os.environ['S3Bucket']
              management_account_id = os.environ['ManagementAccountId']
              tags_to_include = os.environ['TagsToInclude'].split(',') if os.environ.get('TagsToInclude') else []
              role_arn = f"arn:aws:iam::{management_account_id}:role/OrganizationsReaderRole"

              sts_client = boto3.client('sts')
              assumed_role = sts_client.assume_role(
                  RoleArn=role_arn,
                  RoleSessionName='OrgDataCollectorSession'
              )
              credentials = assumed_role['Credentials']
              session = boto3.Session(
                  aws_access_key_id=credentials['AccessKeyId'],
                  aws_secret_access_key=credentials['SecretAccessKey'],
                  aws_session_token=credentials['SessionToken']
              )
              org_client = session.client('organizations')

              data = {
                  'timestamp': datetime.now().isoformat(),
                  'management_account_id': management_account_id
              }

              try:
                  org_info = org_client.describe_organization()
                  data['organization'] = org_info['Organization']
              except Exception as e:
                  print(f"Error describing organization: {e}")

              data['roots'] = []
              try:
                  roots_paginator = org_client.get_paginator('list_roots')
                  for page in roots_paginator.paginate():
                      for root in page['Roots']:
                          root_data = root.copy()
                          root_data['tags'] = get_tags(org_client, root['Id'], 'ROOT', tags_to_include)
                          root_data['children'] = get_ou_hierarchy(org_client, root['Id'], tags_to_include)
                          data['roots'].append(root_data)
              except Exception as e:
                  print(f"Error fetching roots: {e}")

              data['accounts'] = []
              try:
                  accounts_paginator = org_client.get_paginator('list_accounts')
                  for page in accounts_paginator.paginate():
                      for account in page['Accounts']:
                          account_data = account.copy()
                          account_data['tags'] = get_tags(org_client, account['Id'], 'ACCOUNT', tags_to_include)
                          data['accounts'].append(account_data)
              except Exception as e:
                  print(f"Error fetching accounts: {e}")

              timestamp_str = datetime.now().strftime('%Y/%m/%d/%H-%M-%S')
              key = f"org-data/{timestamp_str}/org-data.json"
              s3_client = boto3.client('s3')
              s3_client.put_object(
                  Bucket=s3_bucket,
                  Key=key,
                  Body=json.dumps(data, indent=2, default=str),
                  ContentType='application/json'
              )
              print(f"Data written to s3://{s3_bucket}/{key}")

          def get_tags(org_client, resource_id, resource_type, tags_to_include):
              if not tags_to_include:
                  return {}
              tags = []
              try:
                  paginator = org_client.get_paginator('list_tags_for_resource')
                  for page in paginator.paginate(ResourceId=resource_id, ResourceType=resource_type):
                      tags.extend(page.get('Tags', []))
                  return {tag['Key']: tag['Value'] for tag in tags if tag['Key'] in tags_to_include}
              except Exception as e:
                  print(f"Error getting tags for {resource_id} ({resource_type}): {e}")
                  return {}

          def get_ou_hierarchy(org_client, parent_id, tags_to_include):
              ous = []
              try:
                  ou_paginator = org_client.get_paginator('list_organizational_units_for_parent')
                  for page in ou_paginator.paginate(ParentId=parent_id):
                      for ou in page['OrganizationalUnits']:
                          ou_data = ou.copy()
                          ou_data['tags'] = get_tags(org_client, ou['Id'], 'ORGANIZATIONAL_UNIT', tags_to_include)
                          ou_data['children'] = get_ou_hierarchy(org_client, ou['Id'], tags_to_include)
                          ous.append(ou_data)
              except Exception as e:
                  print(f"Error fetching OUs for parent {parent_id}: {e}")
              return ous
      Description: Collects AWS Organizations data and stores as JSON in S3
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.12
      Timeout: 900
      MemorySize: 512
      Environment:
        Variables:
          S3Bucket: !Ref OrgDataBucket
          ManagementAccountId: !Ref ManagementAccountId
          TagsToInclude: !Ref TagsToInclude
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: OrgGovernancePipeline

  WeeklyOrgDataRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Description: Weekly trigger for Organizations data collection
      ScheduleExpression: rate(7 days)
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Arn: !GetAtt OrganizationsDataCollector.Arn
          Id: OrgDataTarget
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: OrgGovernancePipeline

  LambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      FunctionName: !Ref OrganizationsDataCollector
      Principal: events.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !GetAtt WeeklyOrgDataRule.Arn

  OrgDataDatabase:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Database
    Properties:
      CatalogId: !Ref AWS::AccountId
      DatabaseInput:
        Name: !Ref AthenaDatabaseName
        Description: Database for cataloging AWS Organizations data from S3

  GlueCrawlerRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: glue.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSGlueServiceRole
      Path: /service-role/
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: OrgGovernancePipeline

  GlueS3Policy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-GlueS3Policy'
      Roles:
        - !Ref GlueCrawlerRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt OrgDataBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}/*'

  OrgDataCrawler:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Crawler
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-OrgDataCrawler'
      Role: !GetAtt GlueCrawlerRole.Arn
      DatabaseName: !Ref AthenaDatabaseName
      Description: Crawls S3 org-data for Athena table creation
      Targets:
        S3Targets:
          - Path: !Sub 's3://${OrgDataBucket}/org-data/'
      SchemaChangePolicy:
        UpdateBehavior: LOG
        DeleteBehavior: LOG
      RecrawlPolicy:
        RecrawlBehavior: CRAWL_NEW_FOLDERS_ONLY
      Schedule:
        ScheduleExpression: rate(1 day)
      Configuration: '{"Version":1.0,"CrawlerOutput":{"Partitions":{"AddOrUpdateBehavior":"InheritFromTable"},"Tables":{"AddOrUpdateBehavior":"MergeNewColumns"}}}'

Outputs:
  S3BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket storing organizational data
    Value: !GetAtt OrgDataBucket.Arn
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function collecting Organizations data
    Value: !GetAtt OrganizationsDataCollector.Arn
  GlueCrawlerArn:
    Description: ARN of the Glue Crawler cataloging S3 data
    Value: !Sub 'arn:aws:glue:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:crawler/${OrgDataCrawler}'
  AthenaDatabaseName:
    Description: Name of the Athena database for querying org data
    Value: !Ref AthenaDatabaseName
  EventBridgeRuleArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge rule scheduling weekly collection
    Value: !GetAtt WeeklyOrgDataRule.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for AWS Amplify TodoApp with production branch hosting'

Parameters:
  AppName:
    Type: String
    Default: TodoApp
    Description: 'Name of the Amplify App'
  ProductionBranchName:
    Type: String
    Default: main
    Description: 'Name of the production branch'
  Platform:
    Type: String
    Default: WEB
    AllowedValues:
      - WEB
      - WEB_DYNAMIC
      - WEB_COMPUTE
    Description: 'Amplify hosting platform'

Resources:
  TodoApp:
    Type: AWS::Amplify::App
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref AppName
      Platform: !Ref Platform
      EnableBranchAutoDeletion: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: TodoApp
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TodoApp'

  ProductionBranch:

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys a secure, multi-AZ VPC architecture with public and private subnets across two Availability Zones, NAT Gateways for private subnet outbound internet access, and controlled traffic flow following AWS Well-Architected Framework security best practices.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPC"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-IGW"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:
            !Sub
            - "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet${AZSuffix}"
            - AZSuffix: !Select [0, ["A", "B"]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"
        - Key: Tier
          Value: "Public"

  PublicSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:
            !Sub
            - "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet${AZSuffix}"
            - AZSuffix: !Select [1, ["A", "B"]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"
        - Key: Tier
          Value: "Public"

  PrivateSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:
            !Sub
            - "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet${AZSuffix}"
            - AZSuffix: !Select [0, ["A", "B"]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"
        - Key: Tier
          Value: "Private"

  PrivateSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.4.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:
            !Sub
            - "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet${AZSuffix}"
            - AZSuffix: !Select [1, ["A", "B"]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"
        - Key: Tier
          Value: "Private"

  EIPA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:
            !Sub
            - "${AWS::StackName}-EIP${AZSuffix}"
            - AZSuffix: !Select [0, ["A", "B"]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"

  EIPB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:
            !Sub
            - "${AWS::StackName}-EIP${AZSuffix}"
            - AZSuffix: !Select [1, ["A", "B"]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"

  NATGatewayA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIPA.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:
            !Sub
            - "${AWS::StackName}-NAT${AZSuffix}"
            - AZSuffix: !Select [0, ["A", "B"]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"

  NATGatewayB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIPB.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:
            !Sub
            - "${AWS::StackName}-NAT${AZSuffix}"
            - AZSuffix: !Select [1, ["A", "B"]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicRT"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"
        - Key: Tier
          Value: "Public"

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTableA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:
            !Sub
            - "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRT${AZSuffix}"
            - AZSuffix: !Select [0, ["A", "B"]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"
        - Key: Tier
          Value: "Private"

  PrivateRouteA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableA
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGatewayA

  PrivateSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableA

  PrivateRouteTableB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:
            !Sub
            - "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRT${AZSuffix}"
            - AZSuffix: !Select [1, ["A", "B"]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"
        - Key: Tier
          Value: "Private"

  PrivateRouteB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableB
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGatewayB

  PrivateSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableB

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for provisioning a VPC with Flow Logs delivered to a secure S3 bucket, enforcing SSL and minimal permissions for AWS log delivery services. Supports optional prefixes and comprehensive traffic metadata.'

Metadata:
  Overview: 'VPC with Flow Logging to hardened S3 bucket. Includes security best practices: public access block, versioning enabled, SSL enforcement, least-privilege policy.'

Parameters:
  VpcCidrBlock:
    Type: String
    Default: '10.0.0.0/16'
    Description: 'CIDR block for the VPC.'
  LogPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Optional prefix for the S3 log file path (e.g., logs/).'
    MinLength: 0

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: 'FlowLogsDemo'
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: 'Demo'

  FlowLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-flowlogs-bucket'
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: 'Demo'

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref FlowLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnsecuredTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogsBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: AllowFlowLogDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'delivery.logs.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:PutObjectAcl'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogsBucket}/${LogPrefix}AWSLogs/${AWS::AccountId}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                's3:x-amz-acl': 'bucket-owner-full-control'
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref AWS::AccountId
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:ec2:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:vpc-flow-log/*'

  VPCFlowLog:
    Type: AWS::EC2::FlowLog
    Properties:
      LogDestination: !GetAtt FlowLogsBucket.Arn
      LogDestinationType: 's3'
      ResourceId: !Ref VPC
      ResourceType: 'VPC'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc-flowlog'
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: 'Demo'

Outputs:
  FlowLogsBucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket storing VPC Flow Logs. Use for downstream integration.'
    Value: !Ref FlowLogsBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FlowLogsBucketName'
  VpcId:
    Description: 'ID of the VPC with Flow Logs enabled.'
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VpcId'
  FlowLogId:
    Description: 'ID of the VPC Flow Log resource.'
    Value: !Ref VPCFlowLog
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FlowLogId'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for AWS Workloads Risk Management System integrating DynamoDB for data storage, Lambda functions for risk data ingestion and querying, IAM roles with least-privilege permissions, and SNS for notifications with SSM OpsCenter integration.'

Resources:
  RiskManagementTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RiskTable-${AWS::Region}'
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: workload_id
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: question_id
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: workload_id
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: question_id
          KeyType: RANGE
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true

  LambdaRiskManagementRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaRiskManagementRole-${AWS::Region}'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'lambda:FunctionVersion': '$LATEST'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DynamoDBAccessPolicy-${AWS::Region}'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:PutItem
                  - dynamodb:GetItem
                  - dynamodb:UpdateItem
                  - dynamodb:DeleteItem
                  - dynamodb:Query
                  - dynamodb:Scan
                  - dynamodb:BatchGetItem
                  - dynamodb:BatchWriteItem
                Resource: !GetAtt RiskManagementTable.Arn

  RiskNotificationsTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RiskTopic-${AWS::Region}'
      DisplayName: 'Risk Management Alerts'

  RiskNotificationsTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref RiskNotificationsTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Id: RiskNotificationsTopicPolicy
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSSMOpCenterPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ssm.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref RiskNotificationsTopic
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'

  RiskDataIngestionFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RiskDataIngestionFunction-${AWS::Region}'
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import os
          def handler(event, context):
              dynamodb_table = os.environ.get('DYNAMODB_TABLE', 'not-set')
              sns_topic_arn = os.environ.get('SNS_TOPIC_ARN', 'not-set')
              print(f"RiskDataIngestionFunction: Table={dynamodb_table}, Topic={sns_topic_arn}")
              return {'statusCode': 200, 'body': json.dumps('Risk data ingestion placeholder executed successfully')}
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 256
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaRiskManagementRole.Arn
      Environment:
        Variables:
          DYNAMODB_TABLE: !Ref RiskManagementTable
          SNS_TOPIC_ARN: !Ref RiskNotificationsTopic
      Description: 'Lambda function for ingesting risk data into DynamoDB for workload risk management.'

  RiskQueryFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RiskQueryFunction-${AWS::Region}'
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import os
          def handler(event, context):
              dynamodb_table = os.environ.get('DYNAMODB_TABLE', 'not-set')
              sns_topic_arn = os.environ.get('SNS_TOPIC_ARN', 'not-set')
              print(f"RiskQueryFunction: Table={dynamodb_table}, Topic={sns_topic_arn}")
              return {'statusCode': 200, 'body': json.dumps('Risk data query placeholder executed successfully')}
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 256
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaRiskManagementRole.Arn
      Environment:
        Variables:
          DYNAMODB_TABLE: !Ref RiskManagementTable
          SNS_TOPIC_ARN: !Ref RiskNotificationsTopic
      Description: 'Lambda function for querying risk data from DynamoDB for workload risk management.'

Outputs:
  DynamoDBTableName:
    Description: 'Name of the DynamoDB table for storing workload and risk data.'
    Value: !Ref RiskManagementTable
  RiskDataIngestionFunctionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Lambda function for risk data ingestion.'
    Value: !GetAtt RiskDataIngestionFunction.Arn
  RiskQueryFunctionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Lambda function for querying risk data.'
    Value: !GetAtt RiskQueryFunction.Arn
  RiskNotificationsTopicArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS topic for risk management notifications.'
    Value: !Ref RiskNotificationsTopic
  LambdaRiskManagementRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the IAM role used by the Lambda functions.'
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaRiskManagementRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Lab environment for testing EC2 instance scheduling automation with Instance Scheduler, including VPC, managed instances, and admin instance.'

Parameters:
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: '10.0.0.0/16'
    Description: 'CIDR block for VPC'
  SubnetCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: '10.0.1.0/24'
    Description: 'CIDR block for public subnet'
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: 'AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>'
    Default: '/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2'

Resources:
  InstanceSchedulerLabVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: InstanceSchedulerLabVPC
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: InstanceSchedulerLabIGW
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref InstanceSchedulerLabVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref InstanceSchedulerLabVPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref SubnetCidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref InstanceSchedulerLabVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicRouteTable
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Instance Scheduler lab instances
      VpcId: !Ref InstanceSchedulerLabVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: InstanceSchedulerLabSG
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev

  SSMInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev

  SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMInstanceRole

  AdminInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LambdaInvokePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: CloudFormationDescribePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStacks
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStackResources
                  - cloudformation:GetTemplate
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev

  AdminInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref AdminInstanceRole

  ManagedInstance1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: t3.nano
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ManagedInstance1
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SchedulingLab
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource ManagedInstance1 || /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 1 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource ManagedInstance1
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT15M
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation

  ManagedInstance2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: t3.nano
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ManagedInstance2
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SchedulingLab
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource ManagedInstance2 || /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 1 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource ManagedInstance2
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT15M
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation

  ManagedInstance3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: t3.nano
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ManagedInstance3
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SchedulingLab
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource ManagedInstance3 || /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 1 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource ManagedInstance3
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT15M
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation

  ManagedInstance4:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: t3.nano
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ManagedInstance4
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SchedulingLab
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource ManagedInstance4 || /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 1 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource ManagedInstance4
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT15M
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation

  ManagedInstance5:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: t3.nano
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ManagedInstance5
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SchedulingLab
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource ManagedInstance5 || /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 1 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource ManagedInstance5
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT15M
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation

  AdminInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref AdminInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: InstanceSchedulerAdmin
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SchedulingLab
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash -x
          yum update -y
          curl "https://awscli.amazonaws.com/awscli-exe-linux-x86_64.zip" -o "awscliv2.zip"
          unzip awscliv2.zip
          ./aws/install
          yum install -y python3 python3-pip
          pip3 install instance-scheduler --upgrade
          aws configure set aws_access_key_id "" --profile default
          aws configure set aws_secret_access_key "" --profile default
          aws configure set default.region ${AWS::Region}
          instance-scheduler --help
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource AdminInstance || /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 1 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource AdminInstance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT20M
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation
      - AdminInstanceRole

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref InstanceSchedulerLabVPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VpcId'

  SubnetId:
    Description: Public Subnet ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SubnetId'

  AdminInstanceId:
    Description: Admin Instance ID
    Value: !Ref AdminInstance
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AdminInstanceId'

  AdminSSMStartSessionURL:
    Description: SSM Session Manager URL for Admin Instance
    Value: !Sub 'https://${AWS::Region}.ssm.${AWS::URLSuffix}/session-manager/start-session?target=${AdminInstance}'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AdminSSMURL'

  ManagedInstanceIds:
    Description: Array of Managed Instance IDs
    Value: !Join [',', [!Ref ManagedInstance1, !Ref ManagedInstance2, !Ref ManagedInstance3, !Ref ManagedInstance4, !Ref ManagedInstance5]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ManagedInstanceIds'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket with event-driven notifications to an SNS topic for s3:ObjectCreated:* events, including security best practices.

Resources:
  SNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: S3ObjectCreatedTopic
      DisplayName: S3 Object Created Notifications
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  SNSTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sns:Publish
            Resource: !GetAtt SNSTopic.TopicArn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${AWS::StackName}-bucket-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::Partition}'
      Topics:
        - !Ref SNSTopic

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-bucket-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::Partition}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      NotificationConfiguration:
        TopicConfigurations:
          - Topic: !Ref SNSTopic
            Event: s3:ObjectCreated:*

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
  SNSTopicArn:
    Value: !Ref SNSTopic

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'API Gateway REST API integrated with SQS for HTTP-based message retrieval'

Resources:
  Queue:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::Queue'
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}Queue'
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 20

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy'
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: 'apigateway.amazonaws.com'
            Action: 'sqs:ReceiveMessage'
            Resource:
              - '*'
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${RestApi}/*/*/*'
      Queues:
        - !Ref Queue

  ApiGatewaySqsExecutionRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'apigateway.amazonaws.com'
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${RestApi}/*/*/*'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: 'sqs-receive'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: 'sqs:ReceiveMessage'
                Resource: !GetAtt Queue.Arn

  RestApi:
    Type: 'AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi'
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Api'
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL
      BinaryMediaTypes:
        - '*/*'

  MessagesResource:
    Type: 'AWS::ApiGateway::Resource'
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt RestApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: messages

  GetMessagesMethod:
    Type: 'AWS::ApiGateway::Method'
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref MessagesResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
          ResponseParameters:
            'method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin': true
            'method.response.header.Content-Type': true
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:sqs:action/ReceiveMessage'
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewaySqsExecutionRole.Arn
        PassthroughBehavior: NEVER
        RequestTemplates:
          'application/x-www-form-urlencoded': |
            Action=ReceiveMessage&QueueUrl=$util.urlEncode($input.params('QueueUrl'))#if( $input.params().querystring != "" )&$input.params().querystring#end
        Variables:
          QueueUrl: !Ref Queue
      IntegrationResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
          ResponseTemplates:
            'application/json': |
              #set($xmlResponse = $util.xml.parse($input.body))
              #if( $xmlResponse.ReceiveMessageResponse.ReceiveMessageResult.Messages.Message )
              #set($messages = $xmlResponse.ReceiveMessageResponse.ReceiveMessageResult.Messages.Message)
              {
                "messages": [
                  #foreach($message in $messages)
                  {
                    "messageId": "$message.MessageId",
                    "receiptHandle": "$message.ReceiptHandle",
                    "body": "$util.escapeJavaScript($util.base64Decode($message.Body))",
                    "md5OfBody": "$message.MD5OfBody"
                  }#if($foreach.hasNext),#end
                  #end
                ]
              }
              #else
              {
                "messages": []
              }
              #end
          ResponseParameters:
            'method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin': "'*'"
            'method.response.header.Content-Type': "'application/json'"

  ApiDeployment:
    Type: 'AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment'
    DependsOn: GetMessagesMethod
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi

  ProdStage:
    Type: 'AWS::ApiGateway::Stage'
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref ApiDeployment
      StageName: prod

Outputs:
  ApiEndpoint:
    Description: 'API Gateway endpoint for retrieving SQS messages'
    Value: !Sub 'https://${RestApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod/messages'
  QueueUrl:
    Description: 'SQS Queue URL'
    Value: !Ref Queue
  QueueArn:
    Description: 'SQS Queue ARN'
    Value: !GetAtt Queue.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure admin-managed Cognito User Pool with hosted UI, OAuth support, email verification, and strong password policy.'

Parameters:
  DomainPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: myapp
    Description: Prefix for the Cognito User Pool domain (must be unique).
  PoolName:
    Type: String
    Default: SecureUserPool
    Description: Base name for the User Pool.
  EmailVerificationSubject:
    Type: String
    Default: 'Verify your email address'
    Description: Subject line for email verification messages.

Resources:
  SecureUserPool:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPool
    Properties:
      UserPoolName: !Sub '${PoolName}-${AWS::StackName}'
      UsernameAttributes:
        - email
      AutoVerifiedAttributes:
        - email
      EmailVerificationMessage: 'Your verification code is {####}.'
      EmailVerificationSubject: !Ref EmailVerificationSubject
      AdminCreateUserConfig:
        AllowAdminCreateUserOnly: true
        UnusedAccountValidityDays: 7
      Policies:
        PasswordPolicy:
          MinimumLength: 8
          RequireUppercase: true
          RequireLowercase: true
          RequireNumbers: true
          RequireSymbols: true
      Schema:
        -
          Name: email
          Mutable: false
          Required: true
          StringAttributeConstraints:
            MinLength: '1'
            MaxLength: '2048'

  SecureUserPoolDomain:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolDomain
    Properties:
      Domain: !Sub '${DomainPrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}'
      UserPoolId: !Ref SecureUserPool

  SecureAppClient:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolClient
    Properties:
      ClientName: SecureAppClient
      UserPoolId: !Ref SecureUserPool
      ExplicitAuthFlows:
        - ALLOW_USER_PASSWORD_AUTH
        - ALLOW_REFRESH_TOKEN_AUTH
        - ALLOW_USER_SRP_AUTH
      GenerateSecret: false
      AllowedOAuthFlowsUserPoolClient: true
      AllowedOAuthFlows:
        - code
        - implicit
      AllowedOAuthScopes:
        - email
        - openid
        - phone
        - profile
        - aws.cognito.signin.user.admin
      CallbackURLs:
        - https://localhost/callback
      LogoutURLs:
        - https://localhost
      AccessTokenValidity: 1
      RefreshTokenValidity: 30
      TokenValidityUnits:
        AccessToken: hours
        RefreshToken: days

Outputs:
  UserPoolId:
    Description: Cognito User Pool ID
    Value: !Ref SecureUserPool
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-UserPoolId'

  UserPoolClientId:
    Description: Cognito User Pool App Client ID
    Value: !Ref SecureAppClient
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-UserPoolClientId'

  UserPoolDomain:
    Description: 'Cognito User Pool Domain prefix (Hosted UI endpoint: https://{UserPoolDomain}.auth.{AWS::Region}.amazoncognito.com)'
    Value: !Ref SecureUserPoolDomain
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-UserPoolDomain'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: 2010-09-09
Description: Creates an event-driven integration between AWS EventBridge and a MongoDB API endpoint for processing or logging application events.

Parameters:
  ApiKeyValue:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    Default: test_value
    Description: API key value for MongoDB authentication

Resources:
  CustomApplicationEventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: CustomApplicationEventBus
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  MongoDBConnection:
    Type: AWS::Events::Connection
    Properties:
      Name: MongoDBConnection
      AuthorizationType: API_KEY
      AuthParameters:
        ApiKeyAuthParameters:
          ApiKeyName: test_name
          ApiKeyValue: !Ref ApiKeyValue

  EventBridgeApiInvocationRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole

  MongoDBApiDestination:
    Type: AWS::Events::ApiDestination
    Properties:
      Name: MongoDBApiDestination
      ConnectionArn: !GetAtt MongoDBConnection.Arn
      InvocationEndpoint: https://www.testanu.com
      HttpMethod: POST
      InvocationRateLimitPerSecond: 10

  EventBridgeDeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600

  DeadLetterQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt EventBridgeDeadLetterQueue.Arn
      Queues:
        - !Ref EventBridgeDeadLetterQueue

  ApplicationEventsRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      EventBusName: !Ref CustomApplicationEventBus
      Description: Route custom application events to MongoDB API
      State: ENABLED
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - custom.application
      Targets:
        - Id: MongoDBTarget
          Arn: !Ref MongoDBApiDestination

Outputs:
  CustomApplicationEventBusArn:
    Description: ARN of the Custom Application EventBus
    Value: !GetAtt CustomApplicationEventBus.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-CustomApplicationEventBusArn"

  MongoDBApiDestinationArn:
    Description: ARN of the MongoDB API Destination
    Value: !Ref MongoDBApiDestination
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-MongoDBApiDestinationArn"

  ApplicationEventsRuleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Application Events Rule
    Value: !Ref ApplicationEventsRule
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ApplicationEventsRuleArn"

  EventBridgeDeadLetterQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge Dead Letter Queue
    Value: !GetAtt EventBridgeDeadLetterQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EventBridgeDeadLetterQueueArn"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Private cross-account API Gateway with Lambda backend, VPC endpoint restrictions, custom domain, and secure IAM roles'

Parameters:
  VpcEndpointId:
    Type: String
    Description: 'VPC Endpoint ID for private access, e.g., vpce-12345678'
    Default: 'vpce-12345678'
  CustomDomainName:
    Type: String
    Description: 'Custom domain name, e.g., api.example.private'
    Default: 'api.example.private'
  AcmCertificateArn:
    Type: String
    Description: 'ARN of ACM certificate for custom domain'
    Default: 'arn:aws:acm:us-east-1:123456789012:certificate/12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012'

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      MaxSessionDuration: 3600
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LambdaCloudWatchLogsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: arn:aws:logs:*:*:*

  SimpleLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SimpleLambda'
      Runtime: nodejs20.x
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Handler: index.handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
            return {
              statusCode: 200,
              body: JSON.stringify({
                message: 'Hello from private Lambda via API Gateway'
              })
            };
          };
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128

  ApiGatewayInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !GetAtt SimpleLambdaFunction.Arn
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: apigateway.amazonaws.com

  PrivateApiGateway:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateAPI'
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - PRIVATE
      Policy: !Sub |
        {
          "Version": "2012-10-17",
          "Statement": [
            {
              "Effect": "Allow",
              "Principal": "*",
              "Action": "execute-api:Invoke",
              "Resource": "arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*/*/*",
              "Condition": {
                "StringEquals": {
                  "aws:SourceVpce": "${VpcEndpointId}"
                }
              }
            },
            {
              "Effect": "Deny",
              "Principal": "*",
              "Action": "execute-api:Invoke",
              "Resource": "arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*/*/*",
              "Condition": {
                "StringNotEquals": {
                  "aws:SourceVpce": "${VpcEndpointId}"
                }
              }
            }
          ]
        }

  ApiGatewayRootMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref PrivateApiGateway
      ResourceId: !GetAtt PrivateApiGateway.RootResourceId
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      Integration:
        Type: AWS_PROXY
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:lambda:path/2015-03-31/functions/${SimpleLambdaFunction.Arn}/invocations'
    DependsOn: ApiGatewayInvokePermission

  ApiGatewayDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref PrivateApiGateway
      Description: Initial deployment for private API
    DependsOn: ApiGatewayRootMethod

  ApiGatewayStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref PrivateApiGateway
      DeploymentId: !Ref ApiGatewayDeployment
      StageName: prod

  PrivateCustomDomain:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::DomainName
    Properties:
      DomainName: !Ref CustomDomainName
      CertificateArn: !Ref AcmCertificateArn
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - PRIVATE
    DependsOn: ApiGatewayStage

  BasePathMapping:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::BasePathMapping
    Properties:
      DomainName: !Ref PrivateCustomDomain
      Stage: prod
    DependsOn: ApiGatewayStage

Outputs:
  ApiGatewayId:
    Description: 'API Gateway ID for cross-account VPC endpoint integration'
    Value: !Ref PrivateApiGateway
  CustomDomainNameEndpoint:
    Description: 'Regional domain name endpoint for the custom domain'
    Value: !GetAtt PrivateCustomDomain.RegionalDomainName
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Lambda function'
    Value: !Ref SimpleLambdaFunction
  InvokeUrl:

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'EventBridge integration with DataDog for centralized application log forwarding'

Resources:
  DataDogEventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: DataDogEventBus
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: DataDogEventBridgeIntegration
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  DataDogConnection:
    Type: AWS::Events::Connection
    Properties:
      Name: DataDogConnection
      AuthorizationType: API_KEY

  DataDogApiDestination:
    Type: AWS::Events::ApiDestination
    Properties:
      ConnectionArn: !Ref DataDogConnection
      InvocationEndpoint: 'https://http-intake.logs.datadoghq.com/v1/input'
      HttpMethod: POST
      InvocationRateLimitPerSecond: 100

  DataDogDLQ:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: DataDogEventBridgeIntegration
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  EventBridgeApiInvokeRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: DataDogDLQAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sqs:SendMessage
                  - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
                  - sqs:GetQueueUrl
                Resource: !GetAtt DataDogDLQ.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: DataDogEventBridgeIntegration
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  DataDogRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Name: DataDogRule
      EventBusName: !Ref DataDogEventBus
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - MyDataDogApp
      Targets:
        - Id: SendToDataDog
          Arn: !GetAtt DataDogApiDestination.Arn
          DeadLetterConfig:
            Arn: !GetAtt DataDogDLQ.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: DataDogEventBridgeIntegration
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  DataDogDLQPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref DataDogDLQ
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
              - sqs:GetQueueUrl
            Resource: !GetAtt DataDogDLQ.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub '${DataDogRule}/*'

Outputs:
  EventBusArn:
    Description: ARN of the DataDog EventBus
    Value: !GetAtt DataDogEventBus.Arn
  ApiDestinationArn:
    Description: ARN of the DataDog ApiDestination
    Value: !GetAtt DataDogApiDestination.Arn
  RuleArn:
    Description: ARN of the DataDog Rule
    Value: !GetAtt DataDogRule.Arn
  DLQUrl:
    Description: URL of the DataDog Dead-Letter Queue
    Value: !Ref DataDogDLQ

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket and SQS queue configured for event-driven object upload notifications.

Parameters:
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'my-s3-bucket'
    Description: Base name for the S3 bucket
    MinLength: '3'
    MaxLength: '20'
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-z0-9]([a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9])?$'
    ConstraintDescription: must begin and end with alphanumeric character, contain only alphanumeric characters and hyphens
  QueueNameSuffix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Suffix for the SQS queue name
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9-_]*$'
    MaxLength: '50'

Resources:
  S3Bucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketName}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      NotificationConfiguration:
        QueueConfigurations:
          - Event: s3:ObjectCreated:*
            Queue: !GetAtt SQSQueue.Arn

  SQSQueue:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::Queue'
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${QueueNameSuffix}-${AWS::StackName}'
      VisibilityTimeout: 300
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600

  SQSQueuePolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy'
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref SQSQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt SQSQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Description: S3 Bucket Name for event-driven integration reference
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
  SQSQueueUrl:
    Description: SQS Queue URL for event-driven integration reference
    Value: !Ref SQSQueue
  SQSQueueArn:
    Description: SQS Queue ARN for event-driven integration reference
    Value: !GetAtt SQSQueue.Arn

Description: 'CloudFormation template provisioning an SNS topic, EventBridge rule to match events from source "demo.cli", and SNS topic policy granting EventBridge service principal permission to publish with least-privilege condition on the rule ARN for secure event forwarding.'
Parameters:
  TopicNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Optional prefix for SNS topic display name.'
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9-]*$'
    MaxLength: 32
Resources:
  DemoCliEventsTopic:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::Topic'
    Properties:
      DisplayName: !Sub '${TopicNamePrefix}Demo CLI Events Topic'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Project'
          Value: 'DemoCliEventBridge'
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: 'Demo'
  DemoCliEventsTopicPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy'
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'AllowEventBridgePublish'
            Effect: 'Allow'
            Principal:
              Service: 'events.amazonaws.com'
            Action: 'sns:Publish'
            Resource: !Ref 'DemoCliEventsTopic'
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:events:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:rule/${DemoCliEventsRule}'
      Topics:
        - !Ref 'DemoCliEventsTopic'
  DemoCliEventsRule:
    Type: 'AWS::Events::Rule'
    Properties:
      State: 'ENABLED'
      Description: 'Matches events from source "demo.cli" and forwards to SNS topic.'
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - 'demo.cli'
      Targets:
        - Id: 'DemoCliSNSTarget'
          Arn: !Ref 'DemoCliEventsTopic'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Project'
          Value: 'DemoCliEventBridge'
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: 'Demo'
Outputs:
  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS topic receiving demo.cli events.'
    Value: !Ref 'DemoCliEventsTopic'
  EventBridgeRuleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EventBridge rule matching demo.cli events.'
    Value: !GetAtt 'DemoCliEventsRule.Arn'
  RuleEndpoint:
    Description: 'SNS topic ARN serving as the target endpoint for the EventBridge rule.'
    Value: !Ref 'DemoCliEventsTopic'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Automated monitoring for AWS Secrets Manager with email alerts via EventBridge and SNS

Parameters:
  EmailAddress:
    Type: String
    Description: Email address for Secrets Manager alerts
    Default: 'change-me@example.com'

Resources:
  SecretsManagerAlertsTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-secrets-alerts"
      DisplayName: Secrets Manager Critical Events
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sns

  SecretsManagerAlertsSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: email
      TopicArn: !Ref SecretsManagerAlertsTopic
      Endpoint: !Ref EmailAddress
      FilterPolicy:
        apiName:
          - CreateSecret
          - DeleteSecret
          - UpdateSecret
          - StartSecretRotation
          - FinishSecretRotation

  SecretsManagerEventBridgeRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: PublishToSNSPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref SecretsManagerAlertsTopic

  SecretsManagerApiCallsRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-secrets-events"
      State: ENABLED
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - aws.secretsmanager
        'detail-type':
          - AWS API Call via CloudTrail
        detail:
          apiName:
            - CreateSecret
            - DeleteSecret
            - UpdateSecret
            - StartSecretRotation
            - FinishSecretRotation
      Targets:
        - Id: SecretsManagerSNSTarget
          Arn: !Ref SecretsManagerAlertsTopic
          RoleArn: !GetAtt SecretsManagerEventBridgeRole.Arn
          InputTransformer:
            InputPathsMap:
              apiName: '$.detail.apiName'
              source: '$.source'
              userArn: '$.detail.userIdentity.arn'
              requestParameters: '$.detail.requestParameters'
              awsRegion: '$.detail.awsRegion'
              eventTime: '$.time'
            InputTemplate: |
              {
                "Subject": "Secrets Manager Alert: <apiName>",
                "Message": "Critical Secrets Manager event detected.\n\nAPI: <apiName>\nSource: <source>\nUser ARN: <userArn>\nRequest Parameters: <requestParameters>\nRegion: <awsRegion>\nTime: <eventTime>",
                "MessageAttributes": {
                  "apiName": {
                    "DataType": "String",
                    "StringValue": "<apiName>"
                  }
                }
              }

Outputs:
  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic for Secrets Manager alerts
    Value: !Ref SecretsManagerAlertsTopic
  EventBridgeRuleArn:
