final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for a self-contained web server environment provisioning VPC, public subnet, Internet Gateway, Route Table, Security Group, IAM Role, and EC2 t2.micro instance with Amazon Linux 2, Apache, PHP, S3 content deployment via UserData, and CreationPolicy wait condition.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WebServerVPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  WebServerSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for web server allowing HTTP inbound and all outbound traffic'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WebServerSG'

  EC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonS3ReadOnlyAccess
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2Role'

  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2Role

  WebServerInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: 'resolve:{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2:1}}'
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WebServer'
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - DeviceIndex: '0'
          SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref WebServerSG
          AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum update -y
          yum install -y httpd php unzip aws-cfn-bootstrap
          systemctl start httpd
          systemctl enable httpd
          mkdir -p /var/www/html
          aws s3 cp s3://my-sample-content/webcontent.zip /tmp/webcontent.zip
          unzip /tmp/webcontent.zip -d /var/www/html/
          chown -R apache:apache /var/www/html
          rm -f /tmp/webcontent.zip
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e $? -r "Web server setup complete"
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT5M
    DependsOn:
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: 'EC2 Instance ID of the web server'
    Value: !Ref WebServerInstance
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceId'

  PublicIP:
    Description: 'Public IP address of the web server'
    Value: !GetAtt WebServerInstance.PublicIp
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicIP'

  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: 'Security Group ID for the web server'
    Value: !Ref WebServerSG
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecurityGroupId'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Basic AWS Lambda function with Node.js code that logs event details and returns a value from the input event. Includes IAM execution role for CloudWatch Logs.'

Resources:
  BasicLambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  BasicLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Runtime: nodejs20.x
      Handler: index.handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
              console.log('Received event:', JSON.stringify(event, null, 2));
              return {
                  statusCode: 200,
                  body: event.value || 'No value provided'
              };
          };
      Role: !GetAtt BasicLambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Timeout: 3
      MemorySize: 128

Outputs:
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt BasicLambdaFunction.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaFunctionArn"

  LambdaFunctionName:
    Description: Name of the Lambda function
    Value: !Ref BasicLambdaFunction
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaFunctionName"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: "CloudFront distribution fronting a regional API Gateway REST API with mock /hello GET endpoint returning {\"message\": \"Hello World\"} JSON. Configured with no caching, HTTPS to origin, and viewer redirect to HTTPS."

Resources:
  HelloWorldApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: HelloWorldApi
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL

  HelloResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref HelloWorldApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt HelloWorldApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: hello

  HelloMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref HelloWorldApi
      ResourceId: !Ref HelloResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
      Integration:
        Type: MOCK
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: '{}'
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: '{"message": "Hello World"}'

  HelloDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    DependsOn: HelloMethod
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref HelloWorldApi

  ProdStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref HelloWorldApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref HelloDeployment
      StageName: prod

  CloudFrontDistribution:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::Distribution
    DependsOn: ProdStage
    Properties:
      DistributionConfig:
        Enabled: true
        PriceClass: PriceClass_100
        Origins:
          - Id: ApiGatewayOrigin
            DomainName: !Sub "${HelloWorldApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"
            OriginPath: /prod
            CustomOriginConfig:
              OriginProtocolPolicy: https-only
        DefaultCacheBehavior:
          TargetOriginId: ApiGatewayOrigin
          ViewerProtocolPolicy: redirect-to-https
          AllowedMethods:
            - GET
            - HEAD
            - OPTIONS
            - PUT
            - POST
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
          Compress: true
          CachePolicyId: Managed-CachingDisabled20240815
        ViewerCertificate:
          CloudFrontDefaultCertificate: true

Outputs:
  CloudFrontDomainName:
    Description: Domain name of the CloudFront distribution
    Value: !GetAtt CloudFrontDistribution.DomainName
  ApiGatewayInvokeUrl:
    Description: Invoke URL for the API Gateway /hello endpoint
    Value: !Sub "${HelloWorldApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod/hello"
  ProdStageArn:
    Description: ARN of the prod stage
    Value: !Ref ProdStage

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Metadata:
  Description: 'Serverless Pet Inventory GraphQL API with Lambda backend providing mock pet data'
Resources:
  PetInventoryLambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LambdaLogsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: PetShop

  PetInventoryLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:

              {"id": "3", "name": "Tweety", "type": "Bird"}

          };

          PolicyDocument:

              - Effect: Allow

      Tags:

          type: String!

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for a custom resource using AWS Lambda that performs dynamic arithmetic operations (addition, subtraction, multiplication, division) based on parameters, with conditional failure simulation for testing.'

Parameters:
  FirstNumber:
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 1000
    Description: 'The first operand for the arithmetic operation.'
  SecondNumber:
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 1000
    Description: 'The second operand for the arithmetic operation (minimum 1 to avoid division by zero).'
  Operator:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - '+'
      - '-'
      - '*'
      - '/'
    Description: 'The arithmetic operator to use.'
  FailOnPurpose:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - 'Yes'
      - 'No'
    Default: 'No'
    Description: 'Simulate a custom resource failure for testing (Yes/No).'

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MathCustomResource

  MathHelperFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.12
      Timeout: 30
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import urllib.request
          import urllib.parse
          import urllib.error

          def send(event, context, responseStatus, responseData, physicalResourceId, reason=None):
              responseUrl = event['ResponseURL']
              responseBody = {
                  'Status': responseStatus,
                  'Reason': reason or (f"See the details in CloudWatch Log Stream: {context.log_stream_name}"),
                  'PhysicalResourceId': physicalResourceId,
                  'StackId': event['StackId'],
                  'RequestId': event['RequestId'],
                  'LogicalResourceId': event['LogicalResourceId'],
                  'Data': responseData
              }
              json_responseBody = json.dumps(responseBody)
              print(json_responseBody)

              headers = {
                  'content-type': '',
                  'content-length': str(len(json_responseBody))
              }

              req = urllib.request.Request(
                  url=responseUrl,
                  data=json_responseBody.encode('utf-8'),
                  method='PUT',
                  headers=headers
              )

              try:
                  with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as response:
                      print(response.read())
                  print(f"End responseUrl PUT status {responseStatus} with data {json_responseBody}")
              except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
                  print(f"sendResponse failed with error {e.read().decode('utf-8')}")
                  raise

          def handler(event, context):
              requestType = event['RequestType']
              props = event['ResourceProperties']
              physicalResourceId = 'MathHelper'
              responseData = {}

              if requestType == 'Delete':
                  send(event, context, 'SUCCESS', responseData, physicalResourceId)
                  return

              try:
                  first = int(props['FirstNumber'])
                  second = int(props['SecondNumber'])
                  op = props['Operator']
                  fail = props['FailOnPurpose']

                  if fail == 'Yes':
                      raise Exception('Failing on purpose for testing error handling.')

                  if op == '/' and second == 0:
                      raise Exception('Division by zero is not allowed.')

                  if op == '+':
                      result = first + second
                  elif op == '-':
                      result = first - second
                  elif op == '*':
                      result = first * second
                  elif op == '/':
                      result = first / second
                  else:
                      raise Exception(f'Invalid operator: {op}')

                  responseData['Result'] = str(result)
                  send(event, context, 'SUCCESS', responseData, physicalResourceId)

              except Exception as e:
                  send(event, context, 'FAILED', responseData, physicalResourceId, str(e))
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MathCustomResource

  MathCustomResource:
    Type: Custom::helper
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !GetAtt MathHelperFunction.Arn
      FirstNumber: !Ref FirstNumber
      SecondNumber: !Ref SecondNumber
      Operator: !Ref Operator
      FailOnPurpose: !Ref FailOnPurpose

Outputs:
  CalculationResult:
    Description: 'The result of the arithmetic calculation performed by the custom resource.'
    Value: !GetAtt MathCustomResource.Result
  CustomResourceId:
    Description: 'The physical resource ID of the custom resource.'
    Value: !Ref MathCustomResource

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Serverless calculator workflow using AWS Step Functions and Lambda which processes arithmetic operations (add, subtract, multiply, divide) based on dynamic input.

Resources:
  LambdaLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: /aws/lambda/Calculator
      RetentionInDays: 3

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LambdaSpecificLogsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt LambdaLogGroup.Arn
                  - !Sub '${LambdaLogGroup.Arn}:*'

  Calculator:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Automated image recognition pipeline using Step Functions, S3, Rekognition, and SNS for human face detection with SMS alerts.

Resources:
  ImageBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-image-recognition-${AWS::StackName}"
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      NotificationConfiguration:
        EventBridgeConfiguration:
          EventBridgeEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ImageBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ImageBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'EnforceSSE'
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource: !Sub '${ImageBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption': 'AES256'

  SNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: ImageHumanDetectionAlerts
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sns
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  SNSSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: sms
      TopicArn: !Ref SNSTopic
      Endpoint: "+14071113333"

  SFNLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: /aws/states/ImageRecognition
      RetentionInDays: 14
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ValidateLambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ValidateImageExtensionLogs
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/lambda/${AWS::StackName}-ValidateImageExtension:*"
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ValidateLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ValidateImageExtension"
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              key = event['key'].lower()
              valid_extensions = ['.jpg', '.jpeg', '.png', '.gif', '.bmp']
              valid = any(key.endswith(ext) for ext in valid_extensions)
              return {
                  'bucket': event['bucket'],
                  'key': event['key'],
                  'valid': valid
              }
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128
      Role: !GetAtt ValidateLambdaRole.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  SFNExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: states.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SFNExecutionPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${ImageBucket}/*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - rekognition:DetectLabels
                Resource: "*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref SNSTopic
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: !GetAtt ValidateLambda.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource:
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/states/ImageRecognition:*"
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ImageRecognitionStateMachine:
    Type: AWS::StepFunctions::StateMachine
    Properties:
      StateMachineName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ImageRecognitionPipeline"
      RoleArn: !GetAtt SFNExecutionRole.Arn
      DefinitionString: !Sub
        - |
            {
              "Comment": "Image recognition pipeline for human detection",
              "StartAt": "ValidateImageExtension",
              "States": {
                "ValidateImageExtension": {
                  "Type": "Task",
                  "Resource": "arn:aws:states:::lambda:invoke",
                  "Parameters": {
                    "FunctionName": "${ValidateLambdaArn}",
                    "Payload.$": "$"
                  },
                  "OutputPath": "$.Payload",
                  "ResultPath": "$.validation",
                  "Next": "ImageValidation",
                  "Retry": [
                    {
                      "ErrorEquals": ["Lambda.ServiceException", "Lambda.AWSLambdaException", "Lambda.SdkClientException", "Lambda.TooManyRequestsException"],
                      "IntervalSeconds": 2,
                      "MaxAttempts": 3,
                      "BackoffRate": 2.0
                    }
                  ],
                  "Catch": [
                    {
                      "ErrorEquals": ["States.ALL"],
                      "Next": "ValidationFailed"
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "ImageValidation": {
                  "Type": "Choice",
                  "Choices": [
                    {
                      "Variable": "$.validation.valid",
                      "BooleanEquals": true,
                      "Next": "DetectLabels"
                    }
                  ],
                  "Default": "NoValidImage"
                },
                "DetectLabels": {
                  "Type": "Task",
                  "Resource": "arn:aws:states:::aws-sdk:rekognition:detectLabels",
                  "Parameters": {
                    "Image": {
                      "S3Object": {
                        "Bucket.$": "$.validation.bucket",
                        "Name.$": "$.validation.key"
                      }
                    },
                    "MaxLabels": 10,
                    "MinConfidence": 80
                  },
                  "Next": "CheckForHuman",
                  "Retry": [
                    {
                      "ErrorEquals": ["RekognitionServiceException", "States.TaskFailed"],
                      "IntervalSeconds": 2,
                      "MaxAttempts": 3,
                      "BackoffRate": 2.0
                    }
                  ],
                  "Catch": [
                    {
                      "ErrorEquals": ["States.ALL"],
                      "Next": "DetectionFailed"
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "CheckForHuman": {
                  "Type": "Choice",
                  "Choices": [
                    {
                      "Variable": "$.Labels[?(@.Name=='Person')][0].Confidence",
                      "NumericGreaterThan": 80,
                      "Next": "SendAlert"
                    },
                    {
                      "Variable": "$.Labels[?(@.Name=='Human')][0].Confidence",
                      "NumericGreaterThan": 80,
                      "Next": "SendAlert"
                    }
                  ],
                  "Default": "NoHuman"
                },
                "SendAlert": {
                  "Type": "Task",
                  "Resource": "arn:aws:states:::aws-sdk:sns:publish",
                  "Parameters": {
                    "TopicArn": "${SNSTopicArn}",
                    "Message.$": "States.Format('Human or Person detected in s3://{}/{}', $.validation.bucket, $.validation.key)"
                  },
                  "End": true,
                  "Retry": [
                    {
                      "ErrorEquals": ["States.TaskFailed"],
                      "IntervalSeconds": 2,
                      "MaxAttempts": 3,
                      "BackoffRate": 2.0
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "NoValidImage": {
                  "Type": "Succeed",
                  "Comment": "No valid image extension"
                },
                "NoHuman": {
                  "Type": "Succeed",
                  "Comment": "No human detected"
                },
                "ValidationFailed": {
                  "Type": "Fail",
                  "Cause": "Validation Lambda failed"
                },
                "DetectionFailed": {
                  "Type": "Fail",
                  "Cause": "Rekognition detection failed"
                }
              }
            }
        - ValidateLambdaArn: !GetAtt ValidateLambda.Arn
          SNSTopicArn: !Ref SNSTopic
      LoggingConfiguration:
        Level: ALL
        IncludeExecutionData: true
        Destinations:
          - CloudWatchLogsLogGroup:
              LogGroupArn: !GetAtt SFNLogGroup.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  EventBridgeRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: EventBridgeStartExecution
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - states:StartExecution
                Resource: !Ref ImageRecognitionStateMachine
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ImageUploadTriggerRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ImageUploadTrigger"
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - aws.s3
        'detail-type':
          - Object Created
        detail:
          bucket:
            name: [!Ref ImageBucket]
          object:
            key:
              - prefix: images/
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Arn: !Ref ImageRecognitionStateMachine
          Id: StepFunctionsTarget
          InputTransformer:
            InputPathsMap:
              'bucket': '$.detail.bucket.name'
              'key': '$.detail.object.key'
            InputTemplate: '{"bucket": "<bucket>", "key": "<key>"}'
          RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeRole.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  BucketEmptierRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: BucketEmptierPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource:
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${ImageBucket}"
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${ImageBucket}/*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: "*"
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  BucketEmptierLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BucketEmptier"
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import urllib.request
          import urllib.parse
          import urllib.error

          def send_response(event, context, status, data, reason, physical_resource_id):
              response_url = event['ResponseURL']
              response_body = {
                  'Status': status,
                  'Reason': reason,
                  'PhysicalResourceId': physical_resource_id or event.get('PhysicalResourceId', context.aws_request_id),
                  'StackId': event['StackId'],
                  'RequestId': event['RequestId'],
                  'LogicalResourceId': event['LogicalResourceId'],
                  'Data': data
              }
              json_response_body = json.dumps(response_body)
              headers = {
                  'content-type': 'application/json',
                  'content-length': str(len(json_response_body))
              }
              try:
                  req = urllib.request.Request(
                      response_url,
                      data=json_response_body.encode('utf-8'),
                      headers=headers,
                      method='PUT'
                  )
                  with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as response:
                      print(response.read())
              except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
                  print(f'Failed to send response: {e}')

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              try:
                  props = event['ResourceProperties']
                  bucket_name = props['BucketName']
                  request_type = event['RequestType']
                  physical_resource_id = event.get('PhysicalResourceId', bucket_name)

                  s3 = boto3.client('s3')

                  if request_type == 'Delete':
                      paginator = s3.get_paginator('list_objects_v2')
                      for page in paginator.paginate(Bucket=bucket_name):
                          if 'Contents' in page:
                              objects_to_delete = [{'Key': obj['Key']} for obj in page['Contents']]
                              s3.delete_objects(Bucket=bucket_name, Delete={'Objects': objects_to_delete})

                  send_response(event, context, 'SUCCESS', {}, 'Success', physical_resource_id)
              except Exception as e:
                  send_response(event, context, 'FAILED', {}, str(e), physical_resource_id)
      Timeout: 300
      MemorySize: 512
      Role: !GetAtt BucketEmptierRole.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  EmptyBucketOnDelete:
    Type: AWS::CloudFormation::CustomResource
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !GetAtt BucketEmptierLambda.Arn
      BucketName: !Ref ImageBucket

Outputs:
  ImageBucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for image uploads
    Value: !Ref ImageBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ImageBucketName"

  StateMachineArn:
    Description: ARN of the Step Functions state machine
    Value: !Ref ImageRecognitionStateMachine
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-StateMachineArn"

  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic for alerts
    Value: !Ref SNSTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-SNSTopicArn"

  EventBridgeRuleArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge rule triggering the pipeline
    Value: !Ref ImageUploadTriggerRule
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EventBridgeRuleArn"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for SSM-managed EC2 Auto Scaling Groups on Linux (Amazon Linux 2) and Windows instances with VPC, public subnets, security groups, and IAM roles.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InternetGateway'

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1'

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  DefaultPublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  SSMSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for SSM-managed EC2 instances allowing HTTP, SSH inbound and HTTPS outbound
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SSMSecurityGroup'

  SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SSMRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SSMRole'

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMRole

  LinuxLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LinuxLaunchTemplate'
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: 'resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2'
        InstanceType: t3.micro
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref SSMSecurityGroup
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Name: !Ref InstanceProfile
        UserData: !Base64 |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum install -y amazon-ssm-agent
          systemctl enable amazon-ssm-agent
          systemctl start amazon-ssm-agent

  WindowsLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
